summary: Iteration 4 UI-polish verification: gradient sidebar header, vivid platform icons, h-[72px] alignment between Sidebar header and TopBar, colored stat numbers (amber/emerald/sky), rounded-xl cards with platform-colored 3px left borders, gradient backgrounds, new tagline 'Your comment inbox, powered by AI'. Backend regression: 23/23 pytest pass (1 environment-dependent skip). Frontend: all 11 visual + interaction checks pass via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx: tone-preset row (line 201-242) is rendered as a sibling INSIDE the clickable account div container (account-item-{id}). e.stopPropagation on the dropdown trigger handles it correctly, but structurally the tone preset would be cleaner as a sibling div outside the account item to avoid event-bubbling fragility (pre-existing, not a regression).
CommentCard.jsx setRegenrating typo (line 18, 28, 30) — harmless local state setter name, but worth renaming to setRegenerating for code quality.
TopBar.jsx: 'Approve All' button visually overlaps with the Sonner toast (top-right) when toast is rendered — consider moving toast to bottom-right or shifting it below the 72px header for better UX.
Sidebar.jsx footer 'ReplyDesk' (line 276) repeats branding already shown in header; could be removed for cleaner look on short viewports.
seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded from prior iterations. 4 accounts (TechVlogDaily, travel.with.mia, LocalEatsChicago, diy_dan); pending comment count was 3 at start, dropped to 2 after Skip test (Sarah K + Mike R remain). All YouTube cards confirmed with red left border #FF0000.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/ remain valid (23 pass, 1 skip). Visual verification pinned: sidebar header h=72px, topbar h=72px, stat colors rgb(251,191,36)/rgb(52,211,153)/rgb(56,189,248), card border-radius=12px (rounded-xl), borderLeft=3px solid platform color, background=linear-gradient(135deg, glow, #16161e). Platform brand colors: YT #FF0000, IG #E4405F, FB #1877F2, TT #00F2EA. Tagline visible as uppercase 'YOUR COMMENT INBOX, POWERED BY AI'. Toggle-like, edit/cancel, tone-dropdown, skip, account-filter, show-all all functional.
verified_features: Sidebar tagline 'Your comment inbox, powered by AI' rendered (CSS uppercase)
All 4 platforms (youtube/instagram/facebook/tiktok) visible with vivid brand color icons
Stat numbers colored: pending=amber-400, approved=emerald-400, accounts=sky-400
Comment cards: rounded-xl (12px), 3px solid platform-colored left border, gradient bg
LIKED ↔ NOT LIKED badge toggles via /api/comments/{id}/toggle-like
Edit button opens textarea + Cancel restores
Account filter (click account-item) + 'All Comments' reset works
Approve All button enabled when comments present
No console errors, no error elements on page
Backend pytest: 23 pass, 1 skipped (test_approve_comment skips when 0 pending — env-dependent)
